info.name: IkiBisnis — Role & User Management API
info.description:
Koleksi lengkap Role & User Management API.

**Base URL:** `{{base_url}}/api/v1`

**Cara pakai:**
1. Set variable `base_url` → `http://localhost:3001`
2. Jalankan **Create Role** dulu → `role_id` otomatis tersimpan
3. Jalankan **Create User** → `user_id` otomatis tersimpan

variable.description: UUID role — otomatis terisi setelah Create Role dijalankan
UUID user — otomatis terisi setelah Create User dijalankan
JWT Bearer token — otomatis terisi setelah Login dijalankan

item.name: 🔐 Auth

request.description:
Login dengan email dan password.

**Response sukses (200):**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Login berhasil",
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    "expiresIn": 86400,
    "user": {
      "id": "uuid",
      "fullName": "Budi Santoso",
      "email": "budi@ikibisnis.com",
      "roleId": "uuid",
      "roleName": "Finance Manager",
      "gender": "male",
      "isActive": true,
      "lastLoginAt": "2026-03-05T..."
    }
  }
}
```

**Error cases:**
- `401` — Email atau password salah
- `401` — Akun dinonaktifkan
- `429` — Rate limit (5 request/menit)

response.name: 400 — Validasi gagal (password kurang 8 karakter)

item.description: Endpoint autentikasi. Jalankan **Login** terlebih dahulu agar `access_token` tersimpan otomatis untuk dipakai di request-request lain.

request.description:
Membuat role Finance Manager — akses ke semua laporan keuangan.

**Features tersedia:**
- `dashboard`
- `user_management_roles`, `user_management_users`
- `projects`
- `penawaran`
- `laporan_harian`, `laporan_neraca`, `laporan_laba_rugi`, `laporan_arus_kas`
- `settings`

**Actions tersedia:** `read`, `write`, `update`, `delete`

response.name: 201 — Role berhasil dibuat
409 — Nama role sudah ada
response.body:
{
  "success": false,
  "statusCode": 409,
  "message": "A role with the name \"Finance Manager\" already exists.",
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T04:00:00.000Z",
  "path": "/api/v1/roles"
}

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Admin",
  "description": "Administrator dengan akses penuh ke seluruh fitur sistem",
  "badgeColor": "#DC2626",
  "permissions": [
    { "feature": "dashboard",              "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "user_management_roles",   "actions": ["read", "write", "update", "delete"] },
    { "feature": "user_management_users",   "actions": ["read", "write", "update", "delete"] },
    { "feature": "projects",               "actions": ["read", "write", "update", "delete"] },
    { "feature": "penawaran",              "actions": ["read", "write", "update", "delete"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_harian",         "actions": ["read", "write", "update", "delete"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_neraca",         "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_laba_rugi",      "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_arus_kas",       "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "settings",              "actions": ["read", "write", "update", "delete"] }
  ]
}

request.description: Membuat role Admin dengan akses penuh ke seluruh fitur sistem
Role untuk Project Manager — fokus ke projects dan penawaran

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Viewer",
  "description": "Hanya dapat melihat data tanpa bisa mengubah apapun",
  "badgeColor": "#6B7280",
  "permissions": [
    { "feature": "dashboard",         "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "projects",          "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "penawaran",         "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_harian",    "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_neraca",    "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_laba_rugi", "actions": ["read"] },
    { "feature": "laporan_arus_kas",  "actions": ["read"] }
  ]
}

request.description: Role read-only — bisa melihat semua data tapi tidak bisa mengubah apapun

Mendapatkan semua role dengan pagination.

**Query params:**
- `page` — halaman (default: 1)
- `limit` — item per halaman (default: 10, max: 100)
- `search` — cari di nama atau deskripsi
- `isActive` — filter `true` / `false`
Filter hanya role yang aktif
Mencari role berdasarkan keyword di nama atau deskripsi (case-insensitive)

Mendapatkan detail satu role berdasarkan UUID-nya.

Pastikan `role_id` sudah terisi (otomatis dari request Create Role).

Update penuh role — nama, deskripsi, badge color, dan permissions sekaligus.

Semua field bersifat opsional (partial update).
Update partial — hanya ubah badge color tanpa mengubah field lain

Toggle status role antara aktif dan non-aktif.

Jika saat ini `isActive: true` → menjadi `false`, dan sebaliknya.

Panggil 2x untuk kembali ke status semula.

Hapus permanen role dari database.

⚠️ Tindakan ini tidak bisa dibatalkan.
Test error handling — role dengan UUID ini tidak ada di database
Test validasi — semua field kosong dan permissions array kosong harus ditolak
Test validasi — feature `finance_report` sudah tidak ada di enum SystemFeature (sudah diganti dengan `laporan_harian` dll)
Test ParseUUIDPipe — ID bukan format UUID yang valid

Buat user baru.

**Field wajib:** fullName, email, roleId, password, confirmPassword, phone, address, gender

**Field opsional:** birthPlace, birthDate, nik (16 digit), npwp (15 digit)

**Gender:** `male` atau `female`

**Password rules:** min 8 karakter, harus ada huruf besar, huruf kecil, angka, dan karakter spesial

Get semua user.

**Filter tersedia:**
- `search` — cari di fullName atau email
- `isActive` — `true` / `false`
- `gender` — `male` / `female`
- `roleId` — filter by role UUID

Ganti password user.

`currentPassword` opsional — jika diisi akan diverifikasi dulu sebelum diganti.

Hapus permanen user dari database.

⚠️ Tidak bisa dihapus jika role masih dipakai — tapi user bisa dihapus langsung.
NIK harus tepat 16 digit angka

## Daftar SystemFeature yang tersedia

| Feature Key | Menu / Halaman |
|---|---|
| `dashboard` | Dashboard |
| `user_management_roles` | User Management → Roles |
| `user_management_users` | User Management → Users |
| `projects` | Projects |
| `penawaran` | Penawaran (Quotation) |
| `laporan_harian` | Laporan → Harian |
| `laporan_neraca` | Laporan → Neraca |
| `laporan_laba_rugi` | Laporan → Laba Rugi |
| `laporan_arus_kas` | Laporan → Arus Kas |
| `settings` | Settings |

## Daftar FeatureAction

| Action | Keterangan |
|---|---|
| `read` | Melihat / membaca data |
| `write` | Membuat data baru |
| `update` | Mengubah data yang ada |
| `delete` | Menghapus data |
